mapper.insert: insert into tbl_business_member (id,business_number, company_name, ceo_name, business_type) values (#{id},#{businessNumber}, #{companyName}, #{ceoName},#{businessType})
mapper.select: select count(*) from tbl_business_member where company_name = #{companyName}
select count(*) from tbl_business_member where business_number = #{businessNumber}
